parts.answer: • Language: assembly • Translator: assembler • Each statement is translated and executed before the next • Translator stops when an error is found • ... can correct and continue from where error found // real time debugging when/where error found • ... does not need to retranslate all the code again • Can test sections of the code • Can test without all the program code being functional/accurate/complete Example • Code editor • Run-time environment • Error diagnostics // by example • Auto-complete • Auto-correct • Prettyprint // syntax highlighting • Collapse/expand block • Auto-documentation
